product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Got rid of lice completely!
review_body: Used this shampoo for just one week and ALL the lice and nits were completely gone. The tea tree oil fragrance is amazing and my scalp feels so clean and fresh after every wash. Absolutely no itching anymore.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Bottle leaked all over my bag
review_body: The bottle cap cracked open during delivery and the entire shampoo leaked inside the delivery bag. Complete waste of money. The seal quality is terrible. I had to order from somewhere else.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Smells like a luxury spa
review_body: The fragrance is absolutely divine — fresh tea tree with a hint of mint. Leaves my hair smelling amazing for hours after the wash. My family keeps asking what shampoo I use. Highly recommended!

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Does not lather in hard water
review_body: I live in an area with hard water and this shampoo barely produces any lather at all. I have to use double the amount just to get a basic wash done. Very disappointing for the price.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Scalp feels clean and itch-free
review_body: After the very first wash my scalp felt much cleaner and the constant itching reduced dramatically. The anti-lice formula seems to work well. Took about 4-5 uses to see full results but worth it.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Received dented bottle with broken seal
review_body: The bottle arrived completely dented with a cracked seal. The shampoo had already started leaking when I opened the package. Flipkart packaging needs serious improvement. Raised a return request.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Best shampoo for lice treatment!
review_body: My daughter had severe lice infestation and this shampoo cleared it up completely within 10 days. No harsh chemicals, smells great, and her hair is so soft now. Will definitely buy again.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Hair ends feel rough after continued use
review_body: The first few washes were great but after 2 weeks of daily use my hair ends started feeling rough and tangled. The scalp benefit is real but it seems to strip moisture from the hair lengths.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Sulfate-free and safe for color-treated hair
review_body: Finally a shampoo that is sulfate-free and safe for my color-treated hair. The color has not faded at all after 3 weeks. The lather is gentle and the fragrance is natural. Love it!

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Needed two full bottles to see results
review_body: I had to use almost two full bottles before seeing any noticeable improvement in lice. The instructions say one bottle should be sufficient but that was not my experience. Misleading product description.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Very affordable and works exactly as described
review_body: For the price this shampoo is incredible value. It does exactly what it says — anti-lice formula with tea tree oil and it smells wonderful. No artificial chemicals. My go-to shampoo now.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Rich creamy lather — great for thick hair
review_body: The lather is super rich and creamy which is perfect for my thick long hair. One pump is enough for a full wash. Scalp feels clean and nourished. Fragrance is a bonus.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Fragrance is overwhelmingly strong
review_body: The tea tree fragrance is so strong it gave me a headache during my shower. My eyes were watering too. People with fragrance sensitivity should avoid this. Not suitable for sensitive individuals.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Eco-friendly packaging with no plastic
review_body: Love that they use eco-friendly packaging with minimal plastic. The product is natural and the recyclable bottle design is thoughtful. This is the kind of brand we should support.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Scalp care is excellent but hair texture varies
review_body: The scalp treatment is genuinely excellent — no dandruff, no itch, no lice after consistent use. Hair texture improvement depends on hair type. Works brilliantly for my oily scalp.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Seal broke during transit — complete mess
review_body: Third time ordering and third time the bottle seal has broken during shipping. Either the bottle design or the courier handling is at fault. The product inside is good but useless if it leaks.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: My scalp has never felt this clean!
review_body: Used for 3 weeks and my scalp has never felt this healthy! Zero lice, zero dandruff, and zero itching. The natural ingredients are so gentle yet so effective. Five stars without hesitation.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Mixed results on lice treatment
review_body: It worked for regular dandruff very well but the lice treatment was only partially effective for us. Had to combine with a separate lice comb routine. The fragrance and lather are genuinely great though.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Natural safe ingredients — perfect for kids
review_body: The ingredient list is clean and natural. I feel safe using this on my children. No parabens no sulfates and the tea tree oil naturally repels lice. My kids' hair is lice-free now.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Hair becomes dry after few uses
review_body: My hair type is normal to dry and after using this for a week my ends became noticeably drier and more prone to breakage. The anti-lice benefit is real but the formula is too stripping for dry hair.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Lice gone in one week flat!
review_body: School sent a note about lice outbreak. Used this shampoo 3 times over 7 days and my son's head was completely clear at the school check. Fast and effective. Will keep a bottle in stock always.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Good value great fragrance minor issues
review_body: Overall a very good shampoo. The fragrance is lovely, lather is decent, and it works for lice prevention. Only minor issue is it leaves hair slightly dry if used daily. Every 2 days is the sweet spot.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Bottle quality is extremely poor
review_body: The pump mechanism broke after just 3 uses. Now I have to pour from the broken pump bottle which is messy. The product itself is fine but the packaging quality is shameful for this price.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Absolutely love this shampoo!
review_body: This has completely replaced my previous shampoo. My hair is healthy my scalp is happy and the tea tree fragrance is addictive. No lice since I started using it 6 weeks ago. Genuine recommendation.

product_name: Botanical Luxuriate Tea Tree Shampoo Anti-Lice
review_title: Quantity feels less for the price
review_body: The shampoo itself is good quality but the 200ml bottle runs out very quickly if you have long thick hair. For the listed price the quantity should be higher. Consider the 400ml variant if available.
